data.content: Fixed beats state dropdown transition matching for short 'impl' state in both table and detail views by normalizing to 'implementation' when available; added regression tests in beat-columns-valid-next-states and valid-next-states. Quality gates: lint (warnings only), tsc, and test pass; build still fails on existing prerender issue for /_global-error and /beads (useContext null). Commit pushed to origin/main: 775c3083ffdd74d58af5a1c813f7a2d12996f269.
